_publications._publicationTitle: The loss of Nf1 transiently promotes self-renewal but not tumorigenesis by neural crest stem cells.

_contextSnippet: When cultured from the DRG, nerve, or sympathetic chain, Nf1−/− neurospheres gave rise to 4 to 10 times as many multipotent daughter neurospheres as compared to control neurospheres
details: 4 to 10 times as many multipotent daughter neurospheres compared to control neurospheres from DRG, nerve, or sympathetic chain
